title: Magura Louise Elite 4-Piston Brake is Back, Affordable & Available for Aftermarket Purchase
content:
Last Summer, we saw the return of Magura’s Luise Elite 4-piston brakes. But, at the time, they were only available on complete bikes. That is, until now. The Louise Elite 4-piston brake is now available for individual purchase through your favorite bike shop. The Louise Elite is a brake that targets both urban commuters and mountain bikers who are looking for reliable 4-piston stopping power across different types of riding scenarios.

The Louise Elite 4-piston brakes feature one-piece forged aluminum calipers that are paired with 2.0mm thick rotors. This creates a rigid system where the rider feels their hand force transfer directly into braking power.

The one-piece caliper design helps prevent leaks and also provides heat resistance and consistent performance, whether you’re navigating city traffic or tackling demanding trails.

Plus, Magura also backs their brakes with a 5-year leak-proof warranty on both the master cylinder and caliper.

The Magura Louise Elite has a couple of cool, standout features. The first being, the brake’s master cylinder is fully compatible with Bosch eBike ABS systems for both Touring and Trail modes, offering increased oil flow volume for precise ABS function.

The second is Magura’s Easy Link technology, which offers a tool-free hose connection system, speeding up installation by a claimed 40%. This tech also simplifies maintenance through its master cylinder and brake hose’s easy, plug-and-play design.

Magura Louise Elite Retail & Detail

Retail: $127 (€110)

  • Caliper: one-piece forged, 4-piston, Aluminum
  • Bleeding: Bleed screw on the caliper, valve retrofittable
  • Brake Master: Carbotecture, EASY LINK hose connection
  • ABS compatibility: Bosch eBike ABS ready
  • Rotors: MAGURA 2.0 mm rotors
  • Brake pads: MAGURA MDP 9 GREEN
  • Brake hose: MAGURA Disctube 2.2, rotatable
  • Brake lever: MAGURA LOUISE ELITE, Carbotecture, T25 reach adjust
  • Clamp: Carbotecture, one-piece, Shiftmix IG
  • Weight: 250 g (*100 cm hose, incl. clamp)
  • Warranty: 5-year leak-proof warranty

Get more details and check out everything Magura has to offer.

Magura.com

author: Ron Frazelle
